# XAS Glossary — published site

This directory holds the published HTML view of the XAS SKOS glossary.
Everything here (`index.html`, `XAS_Glossary_SKOS_v2.json`) is generated
by [`.github/workflows/build-docs.yml`](../.github/workflows/build-docs.yml)
whenever `XAS_Glossary_SKOS_v2.json` or the generator changes. The
workflow deploys this directory to the `gh-pages` branch, from which
GitHub Pages serves the site.

**Do not edit files here by hand.** Edit the source files at the repo
root, and let the workflow regenerate.

## Files

| File | Source |
|---|---|
| `index.html` | Generated by `tools/generate_glossary_html.py` from `XAS_Glossary_SKOS_v2.json` |
| `XAS_Glossary_SKOS_v2.json` | Copied from repo root by the workflow so the site is self-contained |

## Local preview

From the repo root:

```bash
python tools/generate_glossary_html.py
cp XAS_Glossary_SKOS_v2.json docs/
python -m http.server -d docs 8000
# then open http://localhost:8000/
```
